title: hymenophyllum geluense
intro: Hymenophyllum geluense, also known as the Gelu's filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum geluense include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, among other uses. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or by using the plant in teas or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
